workflows.name: Radio Reception Pipeline
workflows.description: End-to-end flow from RF/stream input through transcription to browser display

steps.name: Mode Detection
steps.description: Detect SDR hardware via rtl_test, select SDR or Web Stream mode

steps.name: Tune Source
steps.description: Start rtl_fm (SDR) or ffmpeg (web stream) with preset parameters

steps.name: PCM Distribution
steps.description: Read 4096-byte PCM chunks from subprocess stdout, push to audio_pipe and whisper_pipe queues

steps.name: Audio Streaming
steps.description: Serve PCM as chunked WAV HTTP response to browser audio element

steps.name: Transcription
steps.description: Accumulate 2-5s PCM chunks, run silence detection, invoke Whisper on Hailo-8L or CPU

steps.name: Delivery
steps.description: Push transcript segments via Socket.IO to all connected browser clients

workflows.name: Frequency Switch
workflows.description: Switch to a new frequency or stream preset

steps.name: Drain Queues
steps.description: Drain audio_pipe and whisper_pipe to prevent stale audio reaching Whisper

steps.name: Start New Source
steps.description: Spawn new subprocess with updated frequency/URL parameters

steps.name: Broadcast Status
steps.description: Emit status Socket.IO event to all clients with new frequency info

workflows.name: Local Development Setup
workflows.description: Run ravenSDR on a laptop without SDR hardware

steps.name: Install Dependencies
steps.description: pip install from requirements.txt in venv

steps.name: Start App
steps.description: python3 app.py — auto-detects no SDR, starts in Web Stream mode

steps.name: Select Preset
steps.description: Open http://localhost:5000, select NOAA Monterey (confirmed live 24/7)
